list.title: Attributes
list.subtitle: Fields candidates fill in on their CV — title, type, and the values behind dropdowns.
list.emptyNoneYet: Create your first attribute to start shaping the CV form.
list.emptyNoMatch: Try a different search term or category.

detail.noValuesBody: {type} fields collect free input from candidates directly, so there's nothing to configure here. Switch the input type to {dropdown} if you want a fixed list of options instead.

form.createDescription: Define a new field candidates can fill in on their CV.
form.editDescription: Update how this field behaves across every candidate CV.
form.descriptionPlaceholder: Shown to recruiters and as placeholder text to candidates
form.filterableHint: Let recruiters search and filter candidates by this field

Dropdown.label: Dropdown
Dropdown.hint: Pick one from a value list

valueForm.description: One option a candidate can pick from the dropdown.

valueTable.title: Dropdown values
valueTable.subtitle: What a candidate can choose from, in display order.
valueTable.empty: No values yet — add the first option candidates can pick.
valueTable.deleteDescription: Candidates who selected this value will need to pick again. This can't be undone.

preview.title: Candidate CV preview
preview.displayNote: This is a simplified rendering — actual CV templates may style this field differently.

deleteAttribute.title: Delete "{title}"?
deleteAttribute.description: This removes the attribute and every value attached to it. Candidates who already filled it in will lose that data. This can't be undone.
